projectDescription: A React toolkit for building cross-platform rich text editors based on ProseMirror
keyFeatures: Extension-based architecture for modular editor construction
40+ built-in extensions for text formatting, lists, tables, collaboration, and more
Pre-configured presets (WYSIWYG, formatting, core) for rapid development
Comprehensive React hooks and components for seamless integration
Real-time collaborative editing with Yjs integration
publicApiSurface: useRemirror - Main hook for creating editor instance
Remirror - Root React component
OnChangeJSON - Component for tracking editor state changes as JSON
OnChangeHTML - Component for tracking editor state changes as HTML
BoldExtension - Extension for bold text formatting
ItalicExtension - Extension for italic text formatting
UnderlineExtension - Extension for underline text formatting
HeadingExtension - Extension for headings
LinkExtension - Extension for links
ListExtension - Extension for ordered and unordered lists
TableExtension - Extension for tables
CodeBlockExtension - Extension for code blocks
CollaborationExtension - Extension for real-time collaboration
MarkdownExtension - Extension for Markdown support
useCommands - Hook for accessing editor commands
useChainedCommands - Hook for chaining multiple commands
useActive - Hook for checking active marks/nodes
useHelpers - Hook for accessing editor helpers
useEditorState - Hook for accessing editor state
createReactManager - Function to create editor manager
WysiwygPreset - Preset for WYSIWYG editors
FormattingPreset - Preset for text formatting
CorePreset - Core preset with essential functionality
